introduction: Follow these steps to construct a database schema using DDL commands.

steps.title: Step 1: Create a Table
steps.content: Use the CREATE TABLE statement to define a new table with a primary key.

steps.title: Step 2: Add a Column
steps.content: Use the ALTER TABLE statement to add a new attribute to the table.
steps.code: ALTER TABLE Employees ADD Department VARCHAR(30);

steps.title: Step 3: Truncate the Table
steps.content: Use TRUNCATE to clear all data while keeping the structure.

steps.title: Step 4: Drop the Table
steps.content: Use DROP TABLE to completely remove the table from the database.

expectedOutcomes: Schema altered without dropping the table.
